positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a wise owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by ethereal constellations and subtly drawn woodland flora. The style is modern bohemian tattoo flash combined with crisp vector graphic quality. Focus on strong silhouettes, intricate negative space, and high contrast black and white linework. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed for single-color screen printing on fabric. Clean lines, geometric perfection, deep black ink on a light background. Dramatic, mystical mood, suitable for high-end apparel graphic.
